services.name: Loft conversions
services.description: Full design + build with planning included. Typical timeline 6-10 weeks.
services.longDescription: Full design + build, planning included. We handle everything from initial drawings to final snagging — including engaging structural engineers, building control submission, and party-wall agreements where needed. Most jobs run 6-10 weeks from first day on site.
services.pricingNotes: From £28,000 for a basic dormer; full hip-to-gable from £42,000 including planning fees.

services.name: Single-storey extensions
services.description: Kitchen extensions, side returns, garden rooms. Including all groundwork and finishes.
services.longDescription: Kitchen extensions, side returns, garden rooms — anything that adds ground-floor space without raising the roofline. We handle the full job: groundwork, brickwork, glazing, electrics, plastering, decorating. Typical timeline 8-12 weeks.
services.pricingNotes: From £35,000 for a 4×4m extension shell; full kitchen + finishes typically £55-75k.

services.name: Whole-house renovations
services.description: From damp-proofing to new kitchens, bathrooms and electrics. Lived-in or empty.

services.name: Garden walls & landscaping
services.description: Brick walls, patios, porch builds. Smaller jobs done well.

copy.tagline: Quality building work in Oxfordshire — extensions, renovations, loft conversions.
copy.aboutBlurb:
BobBuilders is a small Oxfordshire-based building firm run by Lucas. We've been turning houses into homes since 2018 — extensions, full renovations, loft conversions and everything in between. Every job gets the same care: turn up on time, talk you through every choice, leave the place tidy.

We work mostly in Oxford, Witney, Bicester and the surrounding villages. Most of our work comes from word-of-mouth, so doing right by you is the same as winning the next job.
aboutBullets: Member of the Federation of Master Builders
All trades in-house — no scattered subbies
Free quotes, fixed prices, no surprises
copy.servicesIntro: Pick the project that fits — or get in touch if it's something else. We're happy to come out for a free quote and tell you straight if we're the right fit.

faq.question: How long does a typical loft conversion take?
faq.answer: Most are done in 6-10 weeks from first day on site. The biggest variable is planning approval — if your project is permitted development, we can usually start within 4 weeks of quote. Full planning permission adds 8-12 weeks before we start.

faq.question: Do you handle planning permission yourselves?
faq.answer: Yes — we handle the entire process for any project that needs it. Architect drawings, planning application, structural engineering, building control sign-off. You don't have to chase any of it.

faq.question: Can I live in the house while you work?
faq.answer: Usually yes for extensions and loft conversions — we tape off the work area and minimise dust. For full renovations, most clients move out for the worst 2-3 weeks. We'll discuss what works for your specific job at the quote stage.

faq.question: What's included in the price?
faq.answer: Materials, labour, scaffolding, skip hire, plant, building control fees, and a clean handover. Planning fees are extra (typically £200-£400). Anything optional or unexpected we quote separately so there are no surprises on the final invoice.

faq.question: Do you offer guarantees?
faq.answer: Every structural element comes with a 10-year warranty. Workmanship on finishes (paint, tiling, fittings) is guaranteed for 12 months. We use the FMB Insurance-Backed Guarantee scheme so cover continues even if we're no longer trading.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.quote: Lucas and his team transformed our loft into the perfect home office. On time, on budget, and tidied up beautifully every day. Best builders we've ever worked with.

testimonials.name: Mark Thompson
testimonials.quote: Total professionals from start to finish. Took the time to talk through every decision and never made us feel like a nuisance for asking questions. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Priya Patel
testimonials.quote: We had three quotes for our extension and BobBuilders weren't the cheapest, but they were the most thorough. Glad we went with them — the work is genuinely beautiful.
